title: astragalus praelongus
intro: Astragalus praelongus, also known as the Chinese milkvetch, is a plant species belonging to the legume family and is native to China and Mongolia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus praelongus include improving immune function, reducing stress and fatigue, and promoting cardiovascular health. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is commonly prepared as a decoction or tea, and is also available in capsule or powder form for modern herbal use.
